re_viewer0.23.2

In re_viewer::external::re_chunk_store::external::arrow::compute::kernels::sort

re_viewer::external::re_chunk_store::external::arrow::compute::kernels::sort

Function sort_to_indices

pub fn sort_to_indices(
    array: &dyn Array,
    options: Option<SortOptions>,
    limit: Option<usize>,
) -> Result<PrimitiveArray<UInt32Type>, ArrowError>
Expand description

Sort elements from ArrayRef into an unsigned integer (UInt32Array) of indices. Floats are sorted using IEEE 754 totalOrder. limit is an option for partial_sort.
